page.label: Settings
page.title: Application settings
page.description: Configure local access options for repository analysis.

githubAccess.title: GitHub access
githubAccess.description: Add a personal access token to analyze private repositories and reduce GitHub API rate-limit issues.

saved.title: GitHub token saved
saved.description: Frontend Radar will send {{token}} with analysis requests from this browser.

empty.title: No GitHub token saved
empty.description: Public repositories still work, but private repositories require a token with repository access.

token.label: GitHub token
token.hint: The token is stored only in this browser and is never saved by the backend.

help.title: Create a GitHub token
help.description: Use a fine-grained personal access token with the smallest repository permissions needed for analysis.

steps.title: Steps
steps.openSettings: Open GitHub developer settings and choose Personal access tokens → Fine-grained tokens.
steps.createFineGrained: Create a new fine-grained token and set an expiration date you are comfortable with.
steps.selectRepositories: Select only the repositories you want Frontend Radar to analyze.
steps.copyToken: Copy the token, paste it here, and use Check token before saving.

contents.title: Contents: Read-only
contents.description: Allows Frontend Radar to read package.json, README, workflow files and project configuration.

metadata.title: Metadata: Read-only
metadata.description: Usually enabled by GitHub by default; needed to read basic repository information.

storage.title: Where the token is stored
storage.description: The token is stored only in this browser. The backend receives it in x-github-token for the current requests and does not save it in the database, reports or logs.

errors.forbidden: GitHub rejected this token. Check that it is active; repository access is verified when an analysis starts.
errors.rateLimited: GitHub rate limit was reached while checking the token. Try again later.
errors.unavailable: GitHub or the local API is unavailable right now. Try again later.
errors.unknown: Could not validate this token. Try again later.

reportPreferences.title: Report preferences
reportPreferences.description: Choose how new analyses are saved and which quality areas are included in scoring.

history.label: Save analysis runs to history
history.hint: When disabled, new reports remain available by direct link but do not appear on the history page.

metrics.title: Enabled metrics
metrics.description: Disabled metrics are excluded from backend scoring and total score calculations for new analyses.
metrics.lastEnabledHint: At least one metric must stay enabled.

categoryHints.testing: Test scripts, test files, tooling and coverage signals.
categoryHints.ci: GitHub Actions workflow quality and project targeting.
categoryHints.dependencies: Package metadata, lockfiles and dependency hygiene.
categoryHints.security: Secret hygiene, env files and gitignore coverage.
categoryHints.maintainability: TypeScript, linting, formatting and source health.
categoryHints.performance: Build readiness, bundler and source-level loading signals.
categoryHints.accessibility: Accessibility tooling and UI review signals.
